items.name: fairops

This ontology provides researchers, developers, and practitioners with a unified, machine-readable framework to guide the design and assessment of fair ML systems.

items.name: Polar-Climate-Effect-on-Indian-Climate

items.name: Estimating-the-Probability-of-Habitable-Exoplanets-Using-Machine-Learning
items.description: An end-to-end Machine Learning pipeline utilizing specialized ensemble methods to analyze and predict exoplanet habitability from planetary and stellar data. This project implements advanced handling of extreme class imbalances (~1.25% minority class presence) to build a robust framework for astrobiological statistical inference.

items.description: An Explainable Artificial Intelligence Framework for Student Depression Risk Prediction using Machine Learning, SHAP Explainability, Gemini-powered Reasoning, and Evidence-Based Recommendations.

items.name: -Telco-Customer-Churn-Prediction-Comparative-Machine-Learning-Analysis-Dashboard-
items.description: Production-grade ML pipeline & Streamlit dashboard solving subscriber attrition. Built on a decoupled Python framework, it resolves extreme class imbalance using scikit-learn. Benchmarks 6 optimized models (XGBoost, RF, SVM) via a live inference engine to convert variables into real-time risk probabilities & client retention strategies.

items.name: World-cup-2026-Machine-Learning-predictor

items.description: Leakage-aware multimodal ML framework for MDD detection from multi-site fMRI/sMRI (REST-meta-MDD, 2380 subjects, 25 sites). Late-fusion of functional connectivity + VBM with SVM, XGBoost & GNN baselines. LOSO validation, ComBat harmonization, HAMD severity regression, Haufe-transformed biomarker maps.

items.description: This machine learning project implements a Linear Regression model to analyze AI industry trends. By evaluating historical data across fifty records with structural accuracy, it maps the direct correlation between professional experience and salary packages. The system establishes a perfect zero-error predictive framework for market forecasting.

Applied ensemble machine learning models to predict equipment failures early, reducing downtime and maintenance costs while improving system reliability.

items.name: reassessment-aleatoric-uncertainty
items.description: A theoretical and empirical re-assessment of aleatoric uncertainty in machine learning. Introduces a formal framework that decomposes aleatoric uncertainty into measurable components and demonstrates that a substantial portion of traditionally “irreducible” uncertainty can be systematically reduced.
